findings.problem: Sanitization drift: after the rupture, the scene quickly converts to adjudicative safety language (legal certainty and aphoristic reassurance) that defuses narrative discomfort instead of holding competing truths and consequences in tension.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the refuge beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:351-377 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:445-447 so Priya still enforces safety but does not instantly morally close the event. Keep concrete stakes active (custody risk, school logistics, financial fallout, relational damage) and let Anika feel both relief and cost in-body.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:351-377 and 445-447, Priya delivers at least one support statement and one complicating consequence statement, and the revised text contains no aphoristic absolution equivalent to 'You did not break your family...'; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: The chapter ending cushions immediate consequence with controlled logistics and reassurance, so the rupture lands as managed process more than irreversible fracture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the closing run at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:473-509 to include one immediate, active cost that cannot be administratively smoothed tonight (for example a concrete school/custody/financial or relational consequence already in motion).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:497-509 contains at least one concrete present-tense consequence that remains unresolved by chapter end and the final paragraph does not frame the boundary as stabilized victory; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: Register drifts stiff in high-pressure exchanges through repeated uncontracted/legal phrasing, conflicting with the style-bible default of high contraction use for spoken dialogue.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten spoken realism at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:303-320, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:351-387, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:451-456 by using contractions as default and reserving uncontracted forms for a single deliberate emphasis beat per speaker.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised dialogue in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:303-320 and 451-456 shows contractions in the majority of eligible clauses for Ravi/Anika, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:351-387 avoids consecutive legalistic declaratives in Priya's speech; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: The refusal sequence overuses standalone 'No.' beats, flattening leverage shifts and making Anika's resistance cadence feel mechanically repeated.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the confrontation turns at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:83-191 so refusals remain firm but each beat changes leverage (agreement breach, bodily limit, relational boundary, exit consequence) instead of repeating identical one-word closures.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:83-191 retains at least three refusal beats while limiting standalone one-word 'No.' lines to no more than two and each remaining refusal adds a distinct new stake; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: A recurring negation-contrast sentence formula (not X/just Y; not X/not Y) appears more than twice and reads as a prose tic rather than intentional variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary sentence architecture in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:5, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:259-271, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:389-390 by replacing negation scaffolds with positive, scene-specific images/actions.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised target spans preserve meaning while reducing this construction to at most two uses across the chapter and each replacement states what is present (not only what it is not); FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: Interpretive summary lines pre-explain motives ('old script,' 'honest and controlling') where the scene already supplies behavior, reducing ambiguity and reader inference.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite interpretive sentences at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:81-82, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:231-232, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:457-458 into observable micro-actions, sensory cues, or contradictory behavior that lets meaning emerge indirectly.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each targeted beat contains at least one concrete observable cue replacing abstract motive labeling and no sentence in those spans directly names a motive pair without adjacent behavioral evidence; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: Mechanical reuse of style-bible stress signatures (counting, ledger logic, logistical inventory, debt math) begins to read as checklist execution and flattens spontaneity.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:145-146, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:199-204, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:461-465, keep only one explicit numeric/logistical stress tell per beat and replace the others with fresh behavior specific to this rupture scene.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each revised target beat uses no more than one explicit counting/ledger action and introduces at least one non-numeric stress response (gesture, avoidance, sensory fixation, speech disruption); FAIL otherwise.

summary: Chapter 13 lands the required spine beats and stays continuity-consistent, but it fails review due to a HIGH sanitization/moral-safety-valve drift after the rupture, plus medium issues in consequence pressure, dialogue contraction/register realism, refusal-cadence repetition, and prose formula repetition/over-explanation.
